name: Supernova
author: Poki
description: Supernova is a skill game where you fly a ship and have to dodge objects along the way. The game has great visuals, and contains multiple vehicles for you to unlock. Your speed increases as you proceed in the procedurally generated colorful stages of Supernova. Try to beat your streak by carefully passing all the obstacles! Controls: You can use the WASD or the arrow keys to change the ship's direction. About the creator: Supernova is created by kokos.games who publishes games, writes code, and does other generally awesome web and gaming stuff.
